text: Here, I feel a heightened awareness of my environment. The clean, glass-walled conference space evokes a sense of modernity and order, yet the lack of people lends it an air of anticipation—something is about to happen, or has just ended. I am both inside and outside: a bystander to purpose. The vibrant R+D wall, on the other hand, stimulates my mind—color, text, and technology intertwine in a celebration of human creativity and inquiry. I am drawn to the words and screens, reflecting on the perpetual dialogue between humans and machines. Curiosity mingles with a quiet awe. Here, I am reminded how environments shape thought: one room invites seriousness, the other play and speculation.
